evidence.page_title: SendGrid Email API and Email Marketing Campaigns | Twilio
evidence.content:
The trusted SendGrid Email API for delivery at scale.

[Explore SendGrid Email API](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/products/email-api) [View pricing](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/products/email-api/pricing)

![Man with glasses smiling and pointing at something near a window](https://www.twilio.com/content/dam/twilio-com/global/en/products/sendgrid/rebrand/Sendgrid_email-marketing_twilio.png/_jcr_content/renditions/compressed-original.webp)

![Man with glasses smiling and pointing at something near a window](https://www.twilio.com/content/dam/twilio-com/global/en/products/sendgrid/rebrand/Sendgrid_email-marketing_twilio.png/_jcr_content/renditions/compressed-original.webp)

Flexible tools for creating engaging email campaigns.

[Explore Marketing Campaigns](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/products/marketing-campaigns) [View pricing](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/products/marketing-campaigns/pricing)

[View all Twilio products](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/products) [Explore Twilio Platform](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/customer-engagement-platform)

- An Open book







[Documentation](https://www.twilio.com/docs/sendgrid)







Use up-to-date documentation to quickly integrate and send with our APIs.

- Shining stars







[Help Center](https://support.sendgrid.com/)







Chat with our AI assistant to get answers to your questions, troubleshoot, or find helpful information.

- Users with a heart symbol







[Partners](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/partners)







Work with one of our trusted partners to integrate our Email API, optimize deliverability, or get help with a pre-built or custom solution.


- Browser Blog







[Blog](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/blog/insights?page=1&products=email%2Cmarketing-campaigns)







Find guidance and best practices for building with our Email API, improving deliverability, and sending great emails.

- Browser palying video







[Resource Center](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/resource-center/guides?asset-type=guide&page=1&products=email%2Cmarketing-campaigns)







Find strategic guides, insights, and research to sharpen your customer engagement strategy.

- Bar Graph







[Status](https://status.sendgrid.com/)







See the status of our products.
evidence.section_path: SendGrid ❤️ Twilio. We're finally moving in together on Twilio.com! > Resources to learn, build, or troubleshoot

evidence.page_title: SendGrid Email API and Email Marketing Campaigns | Twilio
evidence.content:
We're merging our websites to make things simpler. You can now find all our trusted email solutions, plus everything else Twilio offers, over on [Twilio.com](https://www.twilio.com/en-us).

[Visit Twilio.com](https://www.twilio.com/en-us)

![Person in red using a computer displaying Twilio, with icons of message, person, and speech bubble.](https://www.twilio.com/content/dam/twilio-com/global/en/products/sendgrid/rebrand/Sendgrid_hero_twilio.png/_jcr_content/renditions/compressed-original.webp)

![Person in red using a computer displaying Twilio, with icons of message, person, and speech bubble.](https://www.twilio.com/content/dam/twilio-com/global/en/products/sendgrid/rebrand/Sendgrid_hero_twilio.png/_jcr_content/renditions/compressed-original.webp)

Don’t worry—the same SendGrid email products and services, documentation and resources you know and love are available and fully supported on [Twilio.com](https://www.twilio.com/en-us).

[Log in now](https://login.sendgrid.com/login/identifier)

Send email on a world-class platform that delivers more than 200 billion emails every month—and explore the rest of the Twilio Platform to build a complete solution for verification and identity, alerts, support and sales, and more.

![Man wearing glasses using a computer to send emails in an office.](https://www.twilio.com/content/dam/twilio-com/global/en/products/sendgrid/rebrand/Sendgrid_email-api_twilio.png/_jcr_content/renditions/compressed-original.webp)

![Man wearing glasses using a computer to send emails in an office.](https://www.twilio.com/content/dam/twilio-com/global/en/products/sendgrid/rebrand/Sendgrid_email-api_twilio.png/_jcr_content/renditions/compressed-original.webp)
evidence.section_path: SendGrid ❤️ Twilio. We're finally moving in together on Twilio.com! > Email at scale, proven deliverability, and so much more
